headlines.title: 162.30: Japanese Yen falls back to near 40-year lows as intervention risks loom
Japan Lowers Passport Fees to 7,000 yen
Japanese Yen: Policy risks support higher yields – MUFG
TOPIX Hits Record as Nikkei Stalls Below 70,000
Will Japan step in as the yen hovers near a 40-year low?
Ukraine pushes civil drone drive with Japan and Taiwan
Euro holds gains against Japanese Yen following Eurozone Retail Sales

marketTone.ko: 오늘 일본 증시는 토픽스 지수가 사상 최고치를 기록한 반면 닛케이는 7만 선 아래에 머무는 등 엇갈린 흐름을 보였습니다. 엔화는 40년래 최저치에 근접하며 다시 하락하여 외환시장 개입 가능성에 대한 우려가 커지고 있습니다. MUFG는 정책 리스크가 높은 금리를 지지한다고 언급했으며, 엔화의 변동성이 주요 관심사로 부상하고 있습니다.
marketTone.en: The Japanese stock market showed mixed signals today, with the TOPIX hitting a record high while the Nikkei stalled below 70,000. A primary focus is the Japanese Yen, which has fallen back near 40-year lows, raising significant concerns about potential intervention. Policy risks are cited as supporting higher yields, adding to the currency's volatility as it hovers at critical levels.
